title: odonia acapulcensis
intro: Odonia acapulcensis, also known as the Mexican dodonaea, is a type of plant native to Mexico that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Odonia acapulcensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
